data.title: BizClik brings global sustainability leaders together at Climate Week NYC 2025 on Sept 22 to accelerate climate action.
data.description: BizClik is set to launch Sustainability LIVE: Climate Week NYC 2025 on September 22 in New York. The event, organized through its Sustainability Magazine and LIVE series, aims to accelerate global climate action. Scheduled to take place on September 22, 2025, the event anticipates participation from various stakeholders and experts in the sustainability sector. This initiative underscores BizClik's commitment to promoting sustainable practices and addressing climate change.

data.title: "Crypto AI tokens saw a $16bn market value surge, but lost a third of it in 8 months as investors face uncertain future."
data.description: The latest trend in the crypto world is DeFAI, which involves artificial-intelligence agents navigating decentralized finance. The market value of AI-agent coins peaked at around $16 billion in January but has since dropped by nearly a third. Despite this, Wall Street is seeing record highs in AI-infrastructure spending. The initial promise of sweeping automation with DeFAI projects like Virtuals' G.A.M.E. and Ai16z's ElizaOS has led to the creation of decentralized hedge funds where investors pool cash and agents manage it. However, the drop in value may indicate speculative self-delusion, though it could also signal a lasting shift in the market. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Larry Ellison briefly became the world's richest person with $393 billion, surpassing Elon Musk's $385 billion, but lost $34 billion due to market doubts about Oracle-OpenAI deal.
data.description: Larry Ellison, co-founder of Oracle (NYSE: ORCL), saw his net worth drop by $34 billion after briefly overtaking Elon Musk of Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) as the richest person globally. Ellison's wealth reached $393 billion, exceeding Musk's $385 billion after Oracle reported strong earnings, leading to him becoming the world's richest person temporarily. However, his net worth took a hit in the following days, dropping by $34 billion, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index. The swift decline is believed to be linked to market uncertainty surrounding Oracle's $300 billion partnership with OpenAI, possibly leading to an "AI Bubble," as explained by J. Bradford DeLong, a U.C. Berkeley economist. For further details, please visit the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: LayerZero's (ZRO) price hovers at $2.00 during potential token unlock of 25.71M, risking 40% rally gains. Mixed signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ZRO is currently trading at $2.00, facing mixed signals due to an upcoming token unlock of 25.71 million tokens, which poses a threat to the recent 40% rally gains. Technical indicators suggest a neutral momentum for the trading of ZRO.

data.title: First Light Fusion reveals viable approach to high gain fusion, reducing costs of clean energy. Gain is key parameter.
data.description: First Light Fusion has unveiled a groundbreaking achievement in fusion technology by introducing the first reactor-compatible pathway to achieving "high gain" fusion. This advancement has the potential to significantly reduce the cost associated with harnessing limitless clean energy. Gain, which is measured by the ratio of energy output to input, plays a crucial role in determining the efficiency of fusion reactions.

data.title: Ether's price could increase by 75% against Bitcoin due to technical patterns and bullish signals, predicting a surge by New Year.
data.description: In the upcoming weeks, Ethereum (ETH) is expected to make gains against Bitcoin due to the presence of an inverse head-and-shoulders pattern and positive bullish momentum signals. This suggests that ETH may experience a notable increase in value compared to Bitcoin, potentially indicating a shift in the market dynamics. Traders and investors are closely monitoring this development, with ETH likely to surpass Bitcoin in terms of performance.
